category_sources: Official Wasmtime docs describe it as a standalone runtime for WebAssembly, WASI, and the Component Model.
source_facts.description says Wasmtime is a standalone JIT-style runtime for WebAssembly using Cranelift.
docs_sources: Official Wasmtime documentation is hosted on docs.wasmtime.dev.
